subsidyType: city-managed replacement program triggered by disturbances elevated lead sampling and annual replacement scheduling
publicSideCovered: yes the city replaces public-side segments at no cost to the customer
privateSideCovered: yes in city-triggered cases and owner-managed early replacement still receives city-side completion at no cost
propertyRules: residents can request replacement through the city's lead notice portal and eligibility depends on lead or galvanized status disturbance or elevated lead results
contractorRules: city staff or contractors coordinate public-side work and homeowners manage the inside-to-curb-stop segment when using the owner-managed path
